For children, tactile methods can be less reliable due to smaller tooth size and lack of experience. The moisture method is often considered more accurate but requires specialized equipment not typically available in all clinics. Digital techniques have become increasingly popular as they offer both accuracy and convenience without requiring additional instruments or materials.
